headline: J.B. Hunt (JBHT) Is Up 5.6% After Record Intermodal Volumes And Profit Rebound In Q2
summary: In the past week, J.B. Hunt Transport Services reported second-quarter 2026 results with revenue rising to US$3,495.30 million and net income to US$181.03 million, lifting diluted EPS from continuing operations to US$1.91 from US$1.31 a year earlier. The company also completed a US$210.06 million share repurchase program and delivered record intermodal volumes with double-digit load growth, while its brokerage business turned profitable for the first time in 14 quarters. We’ll now examine...

headline: J.B. Hunt (JBHT) Stock Fair Value Rises After Analysts Lift Transport Outlook
summary: The latest analyst work on J.B. Hunt Transport Services centers on a higher fair value estimate for the stock, with the modeled figure moving from US$251.45 to US$288.18, a change of about 14.6%. This shift sits alongside a wide range of Street price targets and ratings, reflecting different views on how intermodal growth, the freight cycle, and current valuation line up. Read on to see how these updates fit into the evolving narrative around J.B. Hunt and what you may want to watch...
